full_content:
GOV-HARNESS-STATE-SOT-CONSOLIDATION-001 v1 - Harness State Source-of-Truth Consolidation.

Contract: GroundTruth-KB harness state is exclusively governed by three SoT files:
1. Roles SoT: harness-state/harness-registry.json - MemBase projection per REQ-HARNESS-REGISTRY-001.
2. Identities SoT: harness-state/harness-identities.json.
3. Capabilities SoT: config/agent-control/harness-capability-registry.toml.

All readers MUST access these SoTs through one canonical entrypoint:
- Python: groundtruth_kb.harness_projection.{read_roles, read_identity, read_capabilities}.
- Shell: gt harness {roles, identity, capabilities} subcommands.

Direct file reads of the three SoTs in committed code are FORBIDDEN except inside the canonical entrypoint module.

Retired paths: harness-state/role-assignments.json is retired; harness-state/{claude,codex}/operating-role.md overlays retired.

Extends: GOV-SOURCE-OF-TRUTH-FRESHNESS-001. Severity: blocking.

Owner AUQ approval captured this session (Phase-1 batch AUQ 1 of 4).
